slides.title: Eat your food in *this exact order*.
slides.sub: It's called meal sequencing, and it changes your glucose curve more than the food itself. Most people eat in the worst possible order.

slides.title: Carbs-first hits hardest
slides.body: Starting a meal with bread or rice sends glucose *straight up* — then the crash drags your energy down with it.

slides.title: Vegetables and fiber first
slides.body: Open every meal with the *fiber and veg*. They form a mesh in your gut that slows how fast sugar hits your blood.

slides.title: Protein and fats next
slides.body: Eat your *protein and fats* second. They trigger GLP-1, the hormone that tells your stomach to empty slower.

slides.title: Save carbs for last
slides.body: Now the rice and bread land on a *slowed-down stomach* — same meal, far gentler spike, no afternoon crash.

slides.title: Steadier energy, all day
slides.body: Change nothing about your meal except the *order you eat it* — and watch your energy stop swinging.

slides.title: Eat in the *right order*, automatically.
slides.body: Snap a photo of your plate and Vibe Health flags the smart order to eat it — so steadier energy becomes a habit, not a guessing game.

caption:
The order you eat your food changes your blood sugar more than the food itself. 🍽️

Veg and fiber first, protein and fats next, carbs last — same meal, steadier energy, no afternoon crash. Save this one. 🔖

Vibe Health flags the smart order to eat your plate → link in bio.
youtube_title: Eat Your Food In This Order For Steady Energy
